name: Tango
description:
Use: Devour

Consumes a target tree to gain %health_regen% health regeneration for %buff_duration% seconds. Consuming an Ironwood Tree doubles the heal duration.

Comes with %tooltip_charges% charges. Can be used on an allied hero to give them one Tango.

Tree Range: %abilitycastrange%
lore: Forage to survive on the battlefield.
